
# Include MLIR Python CMake utilities
include(AddMLIRPython)
find_package(pybind11 CONFIG REQUIRED)

add_compile_definitions("MLIR_PYTHON_PACKAGE_PREFIX=mopt.")

# Define main Python package sources
declare_mlir_python_sources(MoptPythonSources)

# Add top-level __init__.py to Python sources
declare_mlir_python_sources(MoptPythonSources.TopLevel
  ROOT_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/mopt"
  ADD_TO_PARENT MoptPythonSources
  SOURCES
    __init__.py
    # The _mlir_libs/__init__.py is automatically generated by MLIR Python bindings, cannot be included here.
    _mlir_libs/_site_initialize_0.py
)

# Define dialect Python bindings
declare_mlir_dialect_python_bindings(
  ROOT_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/mopt"
  ADD_TO_PARENT MoptPythonSources
  TD_FILE dialects/MrtBinding.td
  SOURCES dialects/mrt/__init__.py
  DIALECT_NAME mrt
)

# Define Python extension module
set(_mopt_private_libs
  LLVMSupport
  MLIRParser
  MLIRIR
  MLIRSupport
  MLIRFuncDialect
  MLIRArithDialect
  MLIRTensorDialect
  MLIRShapeDialect
  MLIRQuantDialect
  MLIRSparseTensorDialect
)

# Add CAPI libraries originally provided by RegisterEverything
set(_mopt_capi_libs
  MLIRCAPIConversion
  MLIRCAPITransforms
  MLIRCAPIRegisterEverything
)

file(GLOB PYTHON_EXT_SRC RELATIVE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} "*.cc")

declare_mlir_python_extension(MoptPythonExtension
  MODULE_NAME _mopt
  SOURCES ${PYTHON_EXT_SRC}
  PRIVATE_LINK_LIBS
    ${_mopt_private_libs}
    MoptCAPI
  EMBED_CAPI_LINK_LIBS
    MoptCAPI
    ${_mopt_capi_libs}
)

set(_source_components
    MLIRPythonSources
    MLIRPythonExtension.Core
    MLIRPythonExtension.RegisterEverything
    MoptPythonSources
    MoptPythonExtension
)

# Add Torch-MLIR Python extensions
list(APPEND _source_components
  TorchMLIRPythonSources
  TorchMLIRPythonExtensions
)

# Aggregate CAPI library
add_mlir_python_common_capi_library(MoptAggregateCAPI
  INSTALL_COMPONENT MoptPythonPackage
  INSTALL_DESTINATION python_packages/mopt/_mlir_libs
  OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/python_packages/mopt/_mlir_libs"
  RELATIVE_INSTALL_ROOT ".."
  DECLARED_SOURCES ${_source_components}
  EMBED_LIBS
    MoptCAPI
)

# Ensure Torch-MLIR Python bindings are built before MoptAggregateCAPI
# These Python bindings are generated in torch-mlir build directory
# Add dependencies for all Python binding targets and extensions
foreach(target_name
    # Torch-MLIR Python bindings
    TorchMLIRPythonSources.Dialects.torch.ops_gen
    TorchMLIRPythonSources.Dialects.torch
    TorchMLIRPythonSources.Dialects
    TorchMLIRPythonSources
    TorchMLIRPythonExtensions
)
  if(TARGET ${target_name})
    add_dependencies(MoptAggregateCAPI ${target_name})
  endif()
endforeach()

# Hide all static library symbols to avoid conflicts with other MLIR Python bindings
target_link_options(MoptAggregateCAPI PRIVATE
  $<$<PLATFORM_ID:Linux>:LINKER:--exclude-libs,ALL>
)

# Create Python package
add_mlir_python_modules(MoptPythonPackage
  ROOT_PREFIX "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/python_packages/mopt"
  INSTALL_PREFIX "python_packages/mopt"
  DECLARED_SOURCES ${_source_components}
  COMMON_CAPI_LINK_LIBS
    MoptAggregateCAPI
)
